targets.name: credit succeeds on shop-local expiry date
debit succeeds on shop-local expiry date
customer notification reaches contact checks on shop-local expiry date
recipient notification reaches contact checks on shop-local expiry date

notes: Executable local-runtime parity for gift card expiry at a UTC/shop-local date boundary. The request starts cold, hydrates the gift cards and a non-UTC shop baseline through cassette-backed upstream reads, and verifies the four expired-card validation branches do not short-circuit while the fixed UTC clock has already crossed into the next date. The shop timezone fields are copied from the recorded very-big-test-store.myshopify.com StorePropertiesShopBaselineHydrate capture at fixtures/conformance/very-big-test-store.myshopify.com/2026-04/store-properties/store-properties-baseline.json.
